topics.title: 动作整理
topics.description: 整理动作位置：list/search（含 uses: 引用查找）、move、全局页 create/reorder、虚拟进程 process ensure 批量归集。Use when tidying action pages, moving actions, or grouping by subprogram reference — not for editing steps.
topics.allowedTools: qkrpc_action_list qkrpc_action_search qkrpc_action_move qkrpc_profile_create qkrpc_profile_reorder qkrpc_process_ensure

topics.title: 动作步骤
topics.description: data.json steps[]：stepRunnerKey、inputParams/outputParams、ifSteps；长 inputParams.value (>4 lines) use files/ + file ref not inline value. Use before step-runner get.
topics.allowedTools: qkrpc_step_runner_get qkrpc_step_runner_search workspace_action_read_data workspace_action_write_data workspace_action_edit_data workspace_action_file_read workspace_action_file_write workspace_action_file_edit qkrpc_action_patch

topics.title: 动作变量
topics.description: data.json 中 variables[] 的类型、defaultValue；quicker_in_param 边界。步骤参数绑定见 action-steps。Use when editing action variables.

topics.title: 写动作流程
topics.description: Quicker 动作编辑 P1–P7 主流程。Use before the first action edit in a session.
topics.allowedTools: qkrpc_action_create qkrpc_action_list qkrpc_action_search qkrpc_action_get qkrpc_action_patch qkrpc_action_set_metadata qkrpc_step_runner_get qkrpc_step_runner_search workspace_action_projects workspace_action_read_data workspace_action_write_data workspace_action_edit_data workspace_action_file_read workspace_action_file_write workspace_action_file_edit

topics.title: 表达式与插值
topics.description: P4 首选：$=、$$ 与 sys:evalexpression（LINQ/字符串/JSON/多变量赋值）。Prefer before sys:csscript for data transforms.

topics.title: 多字段表单
topics.description: sys:form 多字段表单：qkrpc.form.v1 语法与 qkrpc form validate/build。Use when authoring sys:form; do not hand-write native formDef JSON.

topics.title: 实现选型与回退
topics.description: P4 回退选型：须先排除 expressions/evalexpression，再考虑 sys:csscript vs runScript。Use when no dedicated step module fits after checking expressions.

topics.title: 总览
topics.description: Quicker 动作无头编辑总览：P0 环境、docs 工具、P0–P7 索引。Use when starting action editing or choosing which guide topic to read next.

topics.title: 步骤模块 schema
topics.description: Agent 专用 step-runner get：压缩 schema、与 search 分工；禁止 get-ui。Use after search, before writing inputParams.

topics.title: 步骤模块搜索
topics.description: step-runner 目录搜索语法（OR、通配、sys:*）。Use when finding a step module key before qkrpc_step_runner_get.

topics.title: 子程序
topics.description: 公共子程序与动作内子程序的区别及调用工作流。Use when adding subprogram call steps or editing subprogram projects.

topics.title: 工作区编辑
topics.description: .quicker/actions layout; workspace_action_*_data and workspace_action_file_* (id + files/…); patch saves. Use when editing on disk.
topics.allowedTools: qkrpc_action_get qkrpc_action_patch workspace_action_projects workspace_action_read_data workspace_action_write_data workspace_action_edit_data workspace_action_file_read workspace_action_file_write workspace_action_file_edit
topics.compatibility: QuickerAgent; requires working directory in sidebar
